English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Michael H. Nee clippings collection
Nee, Michael H.
7785
1.3 cubic feet. 1.3 cubic feet.
1973-1991. Newsclippings A collection of clippings documenting anything related to gay people. Collection material in English 8277940
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
November 2013
EAD encoding:
RMC Staff, November 2013
Date modified:
Bailey Dineen, March 2014
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
A collection of clippings documenting anything related to gay people, mostly from Madison, Wisconsin newspapers for 1978-1979 and mostly from Chicago newspapers for 1980-1991. Plus photographs of gay softball teams and pride parades in Chicago in 1981 and correspondence to public officials and others about gay issues.
NOTES
Collecting program: Human Sexuality Collection.
Cite As:
Michael H. Nee Clippings Collection, #7785. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Gays.
